calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Hui E. Yu was present in pro per as Guardian Ad Litem for the minors Dong Jin Li and Dong Yang Li, who were also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner and the minors were placed under oath and examined.
Ken Huang was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Publication was filed today, February 25, 2010.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Ivy Hui Yu.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Jason Dong Li and Yorick Dong Li.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
